title: Registry Identity, SBOM, Provenance, Attestations, and Promotion · Automation Case: Ci Image Tag Digest Promotion
summary: A release promotes a mutable tag, rebuilds for production, stores an SBOM separately from the image, generates provenance with leaked build args, and never verifies attestations downstream. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci image tag digest promotion increment in attested image release record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate human-readable tags while binding promotion, deployment, rollback, and evidence to one registry digest.
Retain build record, summary, stages, timings, cache use, inputs, warnings, digest, and controlled reproduction instructions without secrets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.

  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-image-tag-digest-promotion — Generate human-readable tags while binding promotion, deployment, rollback, and evidence to one registry digest.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-ci-image-release-attestations-5
  - competency: ci-worked-ci-image-release-attestations-5
    artifact: attested-release.yaml
    decision: worked ci image release attestations 5
    environment: single-job ephemeral self-hosted runner in a segmented subnet
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      subject: registry.example.test/status@sha256:verified
      tags: [v2.4.0, stable]
      sbom: spdx-attached
      provenance: mode-max
      builder: github-hosted-reviewed-workflow
      actions-attest: 4
      attestation-subject: exact-digest
      verification: issuer-repository-workflow-builder-subject
      promotion: same-digest
      rollback: prior-verified-digest
    verify: verify image digest SBOM provenance signature issuer repository workflow builder subject predicate policy and promotion identity
    failure: Reject tags as identity, detached unbound SBOM, build-arg secrets, signature-only trust, unverified attestations, or transitive SLSA claims.
    repair: Bind metadata to digest, generate safe attestations, verify identity and expectations downstream, promote once, and state SLSA limits.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
